joiningBenefitsValued.label: 500 bonus Reward Points (worth Rs 50) on spending Rs 3,000 within the first 30 days of card setup

milestones.label: 3 complimentary PVR movie tickets (worth up to ₹1,200) on spending ₹75,000 in an anniversary year

additionalBenefits: 1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions between ₹500 and ₹4,000 (max ₹3,500 per calendar year)
Railway surcharge waiver (max ₹500 per calendar year)
additionalDetails: Reward Points can be redeemed for brand e-vouchers or travel bookings via the Kotak Rewards portal at a rate of 1 Reward Point = ₹0.10.
Reward Points can also be redeemed as statement credit (cashback) at a rate of 1 Reward Point = ₹0.07.

A minimum of 2,00,000 Reward Points is not required; a minimum of 2,000 Reward Points is required for statement credit (cashback) redemptions, and a minimum of 300 Reward Points is required for vouchers.

voucherRedemptions.programme: Flight & hotel bookings via Kotak Rewards

internalNotes: Redemption rate for vouchers and merchandise is 1 point = Rs 0.10. Cash statement credit rate is devalued to 1 point = Rs 0.07. Spends on utility, education, wallet loading, government, insurance, gaming, fuel, and rent do not count towards milestone benefits.
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-15.
